display.name: Cosmic Flow
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Slow rolling FBM fluid in cyan/orange cosine palette; bass widens the flow.

annotation.technical_notes: A fluid reaction-diffusion simulation driven by a low-frequency warp field. Per-pixel warp shader uses procedural noise (fbm_noise) to advect the color channels, while frame feedback through sampler_main with a very low decay rate creates persistent, painterly trails. The color palette rotates slowly through a hue cycle driven by time, showing minimal direct high-frequency response to the synthetic test signal.
